anomalies.detail: Bot offline 72 days. trades.csv missing. 58th consecutive audit flag. Zero live revenue.

Win/loss ratio 0.91 at 44.5% WR = guaranteed long-term loss. Root cause unresolved: HYPE atr_mult_sl already 2.0 — prior PENDING_DEV_FIX assumption was incorrect. Need further investigation of why actual R:R < theoretical R:R.

anomalies.value: 100d: 80-90% conf = 40% WR (worst tier). But full 965-trade: 80-90% conf = 60.2% WR (strong edge).
anomalies.detail: DATASET_CONFLICT unresolved — temporal regime shift suspected. Do not expand CONF_PARADOX rule until split-date analysis done.

anomalies.value: HYPE SHORT <75% conf is positive EV (+$8-15/trade, n=80) — BLOCKED by blanket veto
anomalies.detail: hype_short_hard_block rule at 80% gate is blocking profitable sub-condition. HYPE_SHORT_HIGHCONF_VETO_PROBE at 71% conf (below 75% auto-apply threshold). 5 consecutive deferred runs.

anomalies.value: HYPE atr_mult_sl=2.0 — PENDING_DEV_FIX assumption was wrong
anomalies.detail: Run 124 CONFIG AUDIT: HYPE already has atr_mult_sl=2.0 AND atr_mult_tp1=3.0 in trading_config.py:752. The HYPE_SL_ATR_WIDEN PENDING_DEV_FIX assumed current value was 1.0. Fix status downgraded to INVESTIGATION_REQUIRED. R:R gap (theoretical 1.5:1, actual 0.91) likely from trades exiting before TP1, not SL placement.

fixes_applied_this_run.description: Applied 60s minimum floor on hold_time_s (position_manager.py:1367,1398) and opened_at=sim_dt patch (engine.py:1943). HoldTimeRuleManager was neutered for 12 consecutive runs.

tomorrows_focus: RESTART BOT: cd bot && python run.py paper — Day 72 offline, primary action
INVESTIGATE R:R gap: theoretical 1.5:1 vs actual 0.91 — check if trailing stops cut winners, or regime-conditional SL multipliers further tighten HYPE stops
HYPE SHORT <75% conf veto split: raise confidence from 71% to 75% threshold before applying gate split
Monitor SOL_SHORT (63.7% WR) and BTC_LONG (63.9% WR) as primary alpha when live
